Hotel Aqua offers great spa facilities, a gym, and indoor and outdoor pools. Enjoy pretty views of the Euganean Hills and well-decorated, modern rooms in a quiet area just outside Abano Terme town centre.

All rooms come with a balcony, a satellite TV, and a minibar. The style is simple and functional.

Hotel Aqua is home to 2 thermal pools which are open until late. By the outdoor pool you will find sun umbrellas and loungers, as well as a gazebo. Indoors you will find a solarium, saunas and a beauty centre.
